stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced blowout Q1 earnings after market on March 20, exceeding expectations on data center revenue due to AI demand surge. Economic implications include accelerated AI capex by hyperscalers, boosting GDP growth but raising inflation concerns. Market psychology: FOMO buying in semis, reminiscent of 2023 AI rally. Historical parallels: Similar to 2018 crypto mining boom. Analogies: Like oil during shale revolution (supply boom), or gold rush (pickaxes win).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show CNBC/Bloomberg headlines on 'NVDA crushes estimates'; X semantic search (20 posts) 85% positive sentiment on AI Blackwell ramp. High volume spike confirms momentum.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy/long for 10-15% upside next week on momentum; target $150.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short above $155 if overbought RSI>80.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Valuation bubble burst, Fed hawkish pivot, competition from AMD.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings beat + X hype + historical post-earnings run-ups average +10%.

stocks.impact_theory: Elon Musk tweets delay in Robotaxi unveil to June, citing regulatory hurdles. Implications: Delays EV adoption timeline, hits growth narrative. Psychology: Profit-taking after rally. Parallels: 2020 battery day hype deflate. Analogies: Like waiting for Starship launch (hype-delay cycle), or iPhone delays.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X keyword search (Latest,20) shows #TSLA down 70% sentiment; news on Reuters 'Musk delays Robotaxi'. Delivery numbers solid but overshadowed.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Dip buy at $220 support for 5% rebound on deliveries.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 10% drop to $210; momentum fading.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Surprise positive tweet reversal, China sales beat.

stocks.justification: High X noise but fundamentals intact; sentiment volatile.

stocks.impact_theory: SMCI partners with NVDA for liquid-cooled AI servers, riding coattails. Implications: Supply chain boom for AI infra. Psychology: Sympathy play. Parallels: 2021 server demand post-COVID. Analogies: Rails for AI train, or GPU foundry.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News snippets link to NVDA ecosystem; X posts praise 'next NVDA'. 18/20 positive.

stocks.justification: Direct tie to NVDA catalyst, volume confirmation.

stocks.impact_theory: New $500M DoD contract for AI platform. Implications: Validates gov revenue, derisks. Psychology: Meme-to-real growth. Parallels: SNOW gov wins 2022. Analogies: Oil to defense (endless budget), or AWS early contracts.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Bloomberg confirms contract; X hype from influencers, 16/20 bullish.

stocks.impact_theory: ARM licenses new AI cores to Apple, Qualcomm; PC refresh cycle. Implications: Royalty growth. Psychology: AI everywhere. Parallels: 2016 mobile shift. Analogies: USB for AI devices, or Intel x86 dominance fade.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: WSJ reports deals; X semantic 75% positive on 'ARM AI king'.

stocks.justification: Sector tailwind but less direct catalyst.
